title: Strategic Analysis of the Global Stone Visualization Market and Generative AI Disruption

generationOptions.documentDirective: Create a comprehensive briefing document that synthesizes the main themes and ideas from the sources. Start with a concise Executive Summary that presents the most critical takeaways upfront. This analysis should be structured logically with headings and bullet points to ensure clarity. The tone must be objective and incisive.
